name: Rice Acquisition Corp 3
summary: PART I Overview We are a blank check company incorporated on June 6, 2025, as a Cayman Islands exempted company for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, recapitalization, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses or entities, which we refer to throughout this Report as our initial business combination.
